---
title: "ddQC"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
if (!requireNamespace("devtools", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("devtools")
if (!requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("Seurat")
if (!requireNamespace("ggplot2", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("ggplot2")

if (!requireNamespace("ddqcR", quietly = TRUE)) {
  devtools::install_github("ayshwaryas/ddqc_R")
}

library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(ddqcR)
library(RColorBrewer)

# Loading the preprocessed object
rds_path <- "/projectnb/ds596/projects/Team 9/scQC_project/colon_immune_raw.rds"

seu <- readRDS(rds_path)

# Performing the basic QC 
seu_basic <- initialQC(
  data = seu,
  basic.n.genes = 100,
  basic.percent.mt = 80,
  mt.prefix = "MT-",
  rb.prefix = "^RP[SL][[:digit:]]|^RPLP[[:digit:]]|^RPSA"
)

# Running the DDQC
df.qc <- ddqc.metrics(
  data = seu_basic,
  n.pcs = 50,
  k.param = 20,
  res = 1.4,
  threshold = 2,
  do.counts = TRUE,
  do.genes = TRUE,
  do.mito = TRUE,
  do.ribo = FALSE,
  n.genes.lower.bound = 200,
  percent.mito.upper.bound = 10,
  random.state = 29
)

table(df.qc$passed.qc)

# Filtering the cells
seu_ddqc <- filterData(seu_basic, df.qc)

# Performing the downstream Seurat workflow 
seu_ddqc <- NormalizeData(seu_ddqc, verbose = FALSE)
seu_ddqc <- FindVariableFeatures(seu_ddqc, selection.method = "vst", nfeatures = 2000, verbose = FALSE)
seu_ddqc <- ScaleData(seu_ddqc, verbose = FALSE)
seu_ddqc <- RunPCA(seu_ddqc, npcs = 50, verbose = FALSE)
seu_ddqc <- FindNeighbors(seu_ddqc, dims = 1:50, verbose = FALSE)
seu_ddqc <- FindClusters(seu_ddqc, resolution = 1.4, verbose = FALSE)
seu_ddqc <- RunUMAP(seu_ddqc, dims = 1:20, reduction = "pca", verbose = FALSE)

# Plotting the UMAP
dark_colors <- colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(8, "Dark2"))(length(unique(seu_ddqc$seurat_clusters)))
p_umap <- DimPlot(
  seu_ddqc,
  reduction = "umap",
  group.by = "seurat_clusters",
  label = TRUE,
  repel = TRUE,
  pt.size = 0.6
) +
  ggtitle("UMAP after DDQC filtering") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank()
  )

print(p_umap)
```
